text: Hi, thanks. I’ve been having some side effects with my current medication, like feeling really dizzy and a bit nauseous, and I wanted to talk about whether switching to a different medication might help. Before we get too far, could you also check if a new medication would be covered by my insurance? I’m a bit worried about the out-of-pocket cost if it isn’t covered.
I see you're calling from the number we have on file. Am I speaking with Maya?
